description: test_first_load_pr_success_shows_normal_heading does not include column_data with a remote label, so the entry has no remote label and always goes to STILL_COOKING regardless of repo_pr_loaded. The test passes but does not actually test the success-path (agent has remote label AND repo loaded successfully). It should include column_data=ColumnData(labels={'remote': 'git@github.com:org/repo.git'}) to properly verify that a successful PR load shows 'no PR yet' instead of 'PRs not loaded'.
